puzzle.title: The Voice That Challenged an Idol's Reign
puzzle.intro: Among the messengers of the Almighty was a steadfast servant who rose among a stubborn nation to deliver the truth. Their people had adopted a fabricated deity, turning away from the Creator of all that exists. With unwavering resolve, this individual called them back — but the message was met with denial and rejection. Step through the clues to discover who this devoted servant was.
clues: I was sent as a messenger to a stubborn people who had wandered far from the straight path.
I came to remind my nation of the One who created all that exists — the best of all creators.
My people had turned to a false idol they venerated and called upon day and night.
I boldly challenged them, asking why they would worship a fabricated deity and abandon their true Lord.
They denied me, refused to listen, and held fast to their falsehood — yet my Lord preserved me.
I am Ilyas — and peace was granted upon me, and I was counted among the believing servants of the Most Merciful.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Ilyas
Prophet Idris
Prophet Alyasa
Prophet Dhul-Kifl
Prophet Nuh

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Calling a people away from the worship of Ba'al
Confronting a tyrant who claimed to be a god
Warning a people about an impending flood
Being thrown into a great blazing fire
Leading an exodus from the land of bondage
trial.answer: Calling a people away from the worship of Ba'al

location.label: Key Element
options: The idol named Ba'al
A great ark built from sturdy wood
A staff that parted a vast sea
A sacred garment stained with blood
A burning bush on a holy mount

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Granted peace and counted among the chosen servants of Allah
Led into paradise while all others were destroyed
Rescued from a great fire that became cool and safe
Given dominion over jinn, humanity, and the wind
Body preserved as a lasting sign for the ages
outcome.answer: Granted peace and counted among the chosen servants of Allah
